posts.author: SariHoltz (Sari Holtz)
posts.cookedHtml:
The spot-nik team is excited to share a serious upgrade to SuperForm: Widgets that make your forms easier to read and easier to complete

You can now add:

  • Images – logos, visual cues, examples

  • Text blocks – instructions, explanations, section headers

  • Videos – quick “how to fill this form” walkthroughs

  • Dividers – break long forms into logical parts

  • iFrames – embed content like pages, docs, calendars, etc.

How to use it:

  1. Open your SuperForm

  2. Click on the section where you want to add a widget

  3. Click + and choose the right widget

  4. Drag and drop to arrange your layout
